name.description: Project name including prefix, e.g. 'Project: Auto Strategy'

stakeholders.description: People involved in this project. Source of truth for project↔person mapping (used by triage).

email.description: Primary email address (used for sender lookup)

role.description: Role in this project: lead (owns workstream), contributor (active), external (partner/customer), stakeholder (informed)

externalStatus.description: External status update (safe to share with customers/partners)

internalStatus.description: Internal-only status with confidential information (not shared externally)

lastUpdated.description: Date when the project was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD)
